summary: Exercise a high degree of caution in Türkiye overall due to the threat of terrorism. Do not travel to areas within 10km of the border with Syria.
Exercise a high degree of caution in Thailand overall. Do not travel to the provinces bordering Malaysia (Narathiwat, Pattani, Yala, Songkhla) due to ongoing insurgency.
Exercise a high degree of caution in Indonesia due to the threat of terrorism. Do not travel to the Papua border region.
